questions.q: On April 26, 2026, the parent company of British Airways, IAG, warned that ticket prices could rise due to the closure of which strategic waterway driving up oil costs?
According to business briefings on April 26, 2026, which nation officially warned against a new package of U.S. House of Representatives export control bills?
In a first-of-its-kind move in Canada, which province announced a ban on youth using social media and AI chatbots on April 26, 2026?
In April 2026, scientists achieved a Canadian medical first when a man from which city reached sustained HIV remission?
Dozens of rallies took place across Ontario in late April 2026 to protest Premier Doug Ford's recent changes to OSAP and which other legislation?
Highlighting technology and business partnerships on April 26, 2026, a new AI-powered matchmaking app was launched ahead of which major Tokyo startup event?
In a retaliatory statement on April 26, 2026, Russian official Dmitry Medvedev proposed imposing tariffs on EU-bound exports specifically to counter the Prime Minister of which country?
In April 2026, middle school students in Mississippi prevented their school bus from crashing after their driver lost consciousness due to what medical emergency?
Following a landslide election defeat, Viktor Orbán announced he is stepping down from his parliamentary seat in which country?
The government of which country stated that two U.S. federal agents recently killed in a car crash were not authorized to participate in local operations?
